query:
SELECT name, email FROM users 
WHERE email IN (
  'hello@jdmtravel.co.uk',
  'wayne@onpointtravel.co.uk',
  'shanesholidaydreams@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'jessicafisher@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'arrowslin@gmail.com',
  'malcolmmunroe@googlemail.com',
  'kayleigh@dreamscape-travel.co.uk',
  'amore.travel@thejltgroup.co.uk'
)
UNION
SELECT name, email FROM users WHERE name IN (
  'Mark Clayton', 'Wayne Coffer', 'Shane Bland', 'Jessica Fisher',
  'Linda Arrowsmith', 'Malcolm Munroe', 'Kayleigh Browne', 'Kirsty Dowden'
);
